column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Waving a hand in front of her face in denial" | TEXT="滅相もございません" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up with a thankful but humble face" | TEXT="おかげさまでございます" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing slightly while averting her gaze" | TEXT="私などまだまだ…" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing to her teacher or master behind her" | TEXT="皆様のお力添えです" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Hiding a blush behind a half-closed fan" | TEXT="過分なお言葉ですわ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Taking a back seat in a group photo" | TEXT="影の存在で十分です" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Offering the best seat to someone else" | TEXT="どうぞ、お先に" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Polishing someone else’s tool carefully" | TEXT="微力ながら尽くします" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking peaceful while working in the shadow" | TEXT="分をわきまえております"
